name: desktop
description: Awards Centre Point of Sale System
author: Awards Centre

scripts.electron:dev: concurrently "npm run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron ."
scripts.prebuild: npx shx rm -rf server_dist && npx shx mkdir -p server_dist/src server_dist/prisma && npx shx cp -r ../server/src/* server_dist/src/ && npx shx cp ../server/prisma/dev.db server_dist/ && npx shx cp ../server/prisma/schema.prisma server_dist/prisma/ && npx shx cp ../server/.env server_dist/src/.env && npx shx cp ../server/package.json server_dist/ && npm install --prefix server_dist --omit=dev --no-workspaces && npx prisma generate --schema=server_dist/prisma/schema.prisma && npx shx mv server_dist/node_modules server_dist/server_lib && npx shx cp node-win.exe server_dist/node.exe
scripts.dist: npm run prebuild && npm run build && electron-builder
